violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Deli slicers were dirty during inspection. Slicers should be cleaned after each use.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the deli meat case was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Food employee observed changing gloves after handling raw food items before helping customer at hot case and did not wash his hands before putting on new gloves. Hands should be washed before gloves are donned.

Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed using same pair of single-use gloves for more than one task. Food employee observed handling hand held device with gloved hands and did not change gloves before preparing food. Gloves should be changed when tasks are switched.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Slicers were found dirty. Slicers should be cleaned after each use.
